title: Layout
description: A Layout is the structural shell a set of Pages lives within. It defines the top-level UI frame: sidebar, full-width, split-panel, etc.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the layout.

type.description: The structural type of the layout.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of when and how this layout is used.

features.description: Feature flags controlling which chrome elements appear in the layout shell.

tenants.description: Available tenants/organizations for the tenant picker. First entry is the default.

navigation.description: Hierarchical sidebar navigation structure. Each item is either a nav group with children or a direct nav link. When omitted, the sidebar falls back to a flat list derived from routes. Group labels must be unique.

label.description: Display label for the group header or direct link.

icon.description: Optional Unicode character or emoji used as the nav item icon.

route.description: If present, this item is a direct link (no children). Must match a path in routes.

children.description: Child nav items within this group.

route.description: Path matching a route in the routes array.

label.description: Display label for this nav link.

theme.description: Visual theme configuration for white-labeling. Colors map to CSS custom properties consumed by Tailwind utilities. When omitted, a sensible default theme is generated.

dark.description: Dark mode color overrides. Same shape as colors.

radius.description: Base border radius. Derived sizes (sm, md, lg, xl) are calculated from this.

brand.description: Brand information shown in marketing and sidebar headers.

name.description: Brand name shown in the header (e.g. 'Marshall Fire Claims').

tagline.description: Short tagline shown under or next to the brand name.

logo.description: Optional path or URL to a logo image. When omitted, the brand name is rendered as text.

href.description: Route the brand name links to. Defaults to the first route in the layout.

hero.description: Marketing layout hero section shown above the routed page content on the root route. Omit to suppress the hero.

eyebrow.description: Short label shown above the headline (e.g. 'Marshall Fire Mass Tort').

subtitle.description: Supporting sentence shown below the headline.

route.description: Route path the CTA links to.

secondaryCta.description: Optional secondary CTA rendered next to the primary button.

text.description: Plain text shown in the footer (e.g. copyright line).

pages.description: The Page names that use this layout.

examples.name: AdminLayout
examples.description: Authenticated admin shell with sidebar navigation.

examples.name: PublicLayout
examples.description: Unauthenticated shell for login and signup.
